title: Daily Source Digest
note: Daily source-balanced news digest — morning update.

stories.title: Sam Neill, Beloved New Zealand Actor and 'Jurassic Park' Star, Dies at 78
stories.summary:
Sam Neill, Beloved New Zealand Actor and 'Jurassic Park' Star, Dies at 78. Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor who shined for decades in iconic big screen roles from films like "The Hunt for Red October" to Steven Spielberg's "Jurassic Park" to the Netflix hit series "Peaky Blinders," passed on Monday.

He was 78. The post Sam Neill, Beloved New Zealand Actor and ‘Jurassic Park’ Star, Dies at 78 appeared first on <.

BBC: 'Hero, legend, sweetheart': Tributes to Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill, who has died aged 78. BBC reports that friends, politicians and fellow film stars remember Neill following his "sudden and unexpected" death.

stories.title: One Person Dead After ICE-Involved Shooting in Maine
stories.summary:
One Person Dead After ICE-Involved Shooting in Maine. One person is dead and details are scant following a Monday morning shooting that involved U.S. Immigration and Customs Agents (ICE) in Biddeford, Maine.

The Portland Press Herald reported the incident occurred “at the corner of Pool and Hill streets.” The post One Person Dead After ICE-Involved Shooting in Maine appeared first on <a rel="nofollow" href=. Al Jazeera: Person killed in shooting involving ICE agents in US state of Maine.

Al Jazeera reports that state lawmaker says one person was killed by immigration agents in Biddeford, days after another ICE shooting in Texas.

stories.title: Trump reimposes Iran blockade and U.S. will control Strait of Hormuz
stories.summary:
Trump reimposes Iran blockade and U.S. will control Strait of Hormuz. President Trump said Monday the U.S. will take control of the Strait of Hormuz, block Iranian ships and get paid by other wealthy nations for safeguarding commercial traffic through the waterway.

Al Jazeera: Trump says US will become ‘guardian’ of Strait of Hormuz and collect tolls.

Al Jazeera reports that iran rejects any US control over strait as both sides trade attacks in major threat to negotiations to end their war.

stories.summary:
British police rearrest the suspect in Ann Widdecombe killing on terrorism suspicion. The killing of former British politician Ann Widdecombe is being investigated as a terrorist act, police said Monday.

Al Jazeera: Anti-terror police take over probe into death of UK politician Widdecombe.

Al Jazeera reports that a 28-year-old man has been re-arrested on suspicion of the commission, preparation or instigation of acts of terrorism.

stories.title: What’s Next For South Carolina?
stories.summary:
What’s Next For South Carolina?. Following Senator Lindsey Graham’s (R-SC) sudden passing, Governor Henry McMaster (R-SC) is expected to appoint a replacement who will fill the remainder of Graham’s term.

McMaster’s choice could take days.

President Donald Trump weighed in briefly on NBC’s “Meet The Press,” joining the program in honor of the late South Carolina senator who had been ... Daily Wire: Trump Recommends Replacement For Lindsey Graham.

Daily Wire reports that president Donald Trump said on Monday that he believes the late Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) would be best honored if his sister, Darline Graham Nordone, were to be appointed to serve out the remainder of his term in the U.S. Senate.

Graham died late Saturday night after what his office called a “brief and sudden ...

stories.title: Tributes Pour In After Lindsey Graham’s Sudden Passing
stories.summary:
Tributes Pour In After Lindsey Graham’s Sudden Passing. When the news broke of Senator Lindsey Graham’s (R-SC) sudden passing, tributes and memories came pouring in from friends and colleagues on both sides of the political aisle.

Graham, who served in the U.S. Senate from 2003 until his death, had a reputation for working across the aisle whenever possible, and counted a number of ... Breitbart: Netanyahu: ‘Israel Lost One of Its Greatest Friends’ -- Israeli Leaders Pay Tribute to Lindsey Graham.

Breitbart reports that israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Sunday that Israel had “lost one of its greatest friends” as he led an outpouring of tributes from across Israel’s political spectrum following the sudden death of Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-SC).

stories.summary:
The worst political gaffe of the week – Back to Back Barries podcast. In this episode of the Barries podcast, co-hosts Barrie Cassidy and Tony Barry examine a long list of stumbles and missteps in what was a busy week in Australian politics.

They also examine the prime minister's Pacific push as China tested a nuclear-capable missile and Nigel Farage’s resignation from the UK parliament only to stand again in an upcoming byelection <a href="https://www.theguardian.com/australia-news/video/2026/jul/11/the-worst-political-gaffe-of-the-week-back-to-back-barrie.

stories.title: I asked AI for help with DIY. It told me to build a subfloor on rotting stumps, but also taught me valuable lessons | Myke Bartlett
stories.summary:
I asked AI for help with DIY. It told me to build a subfloor on rotting stumps, but also taught me valuable lessons | Myke Bartlett.

Nothing does more for your ego than realising you can make a better decision than a bot with all of human knowledge at its digital fingertips I am not, by nature, an early adopter. There comes a point in our lives where change becomes more irritating than exciting and, I suspect, I reached it sooner than most.

But when a workplace recently tasked me with exploring practical applications for AI, I spotted an opportunity to cast off my luddite inclinations. It turned out AI was very.

stories.title: Datacentres drive up big tech’s carbon emissions to a third of those of France
stories.summary:
Datacentres drive up big tech’s carbon emissions to a third of those of France.

Microsoft, Amazon and Google say they still aim to achieve net zero output despite construction boom Microsoft, Amazon and Google’s collective carbon emissions have increased by nearly a fifth in the past year, driven largely by datacentre construction.

In the financial year ending March 2026, the three tech companies emitted 119m mTCO₂e (metric tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent), or about a third.

stories.title: Marcos designates new lands for Cavite, Batangas ecozones
stories.summary:
Marcos designates new lands for Cavite, Batangas ecozones. MANILA, Philippines — President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has issued three proclamations designating additional parcels of land for inclusion in existing ecozones in Cavite and Batangas and creating a new information technology park in Negros Oriental.

Under Proclamation No. 1337, Marcos designated several parcels of land in Barangays Punta I and Sahud-Ulan in Tanza, Cavite, for inclusion.
